name: scenario_MoonModule_control_change
description: Measure the cost of control changes on a running pipeline. Toggles MirrorModifier's mirrorX/Y at different points and verifies each change is applied without freezing the render loop. Companion to the MoonModule control-change gate unit tests (unit_MoonModule_control_change_gate.cpp) — this is the live equivalent.

steps.name: reset-mirrorX
steps.description: Ensure mirrorX is enabled before baseline.

steps.name: reset-mirrorY
steps.description: Ensure mirrorY is enabled before baseline.

steps.name: baseline
steps.description: Set NoiseEffect.scale=4 and measure baseline FPS (mirror on). Effect controls don't rebuild the pipeline — slider stutter check.

steps.name: disable-mirrorX
steps.description: Disable mirrorX. Modifier control triggers a pipeline rebuild — measures the rebuilt path.

steps.name: disable-mirrorY
steps.description: Disable mirrorY. Mirror is now fully off — should land on the no-LUT path.

steps.name: re-enable-mirrors
steps.description: Re-enable mirrorX (rebuild back to LUT path).

steps.name: re-enable-mirrorY
steps.description: Re-enable mirrorY and measure — the heavy LUT path must recover (FPS within 50% of baseline) without staying degraded.
